usage: report_gates [-help] [-hinst <hInst>] [-out_file <string>] [-sort {name count area leakage_power internal_power total_power switching_power}] [-power  | -leakage_power ]

options.name: -hinst
options.description: Name of the hinst to collect cell information. Only cell in the specified hinst will be considered ((hInst), optional)

options.name: -out_file
options.description: File in which report will be saved into. If not specified, information only dumped into log.

options.name: -power
options.description: Provide internal, switching, leakage and total power statistic.

options.name: -sort
options.description: {name count area leakage_power internal_power total_power switching_power} Param used to sort content of the tables to generate leakage_power/internal_power value only respected if the option -power is also specified.
